compounds.frequency: once or twice every 1-2 weeks as needed

benefits.description: Selank helps with stress and anger issues; dose adjusted based on level of need between 1mg and 2.5mg

protocol_notes: Uses Selank as needed at 1mg-2.5mg subq depending on stress level. Semax was not effective for himself. Wife (ADHD) uses 500mcg each subq of Semax and Selank together when teaching CPR classes; Selank helps slow down speech and Semax helps with note detail. Reports extensive peptide experience ('we do a lot of different peps').
